text: The air hums with a power that has slept for ages. The water is not merely water. It is the mountains pulse,
the raw healing essence of the earth. Viridian lowers his weary head, and the moment his snout touches
the surface, the mountain awakens for him. Light surges, not as an attack, but as a homecoming.
The grey, the sickness, the fever, it is scoured away by a tide of pure, verdant life.
The scales drink in the light, remembering their true name, Emerald.
